summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Glowing Star Contest Platform. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified homepage, mobile responsiveness, portal login/register, admin panel, contestants page, and leaderboard. Fixed branding issues where 'Glamour' was still showing instead of 'Glowing Star' in PortalHome.jsx, AdminPanel.jsx, ContestantDashboard.jsx, VotingPage.jsx, LoginPage.jsx, and RegisterPage.jsx.

issues: Icon still uses pink/violet gradient instead of gold/amber theme - minor visual inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: Email OTP system is MOCKED - send_otp_email function in server.py is a placeholder that logs to console instead of sending actual emails
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test contestants
context_for_next_testing_agent: All branding has been updated from 'Glamour' to 'Glowing Star'. WebSocket integration is working (System Online indicator visible in Admin Panel). Email OTP is MOCKED. Two-domain architecture: glowingstar.vote (public voting) and glowingstar.net (management portal). Public site correctly has NO 'Join Contest' button - only 'Vote Now' and 'Contestant Login' external link.

homepage.details: Glowing Star branding visible, gold/amber theme applied, Vote Now button present, NO Join Contest button, Contestant Login external link present

mobile_responsiveness.details: Homepage and Contestants page render correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)

portal_login.details: Shows admin@glowingstar.net demo credentials, login form works correctly

portal_register.details: Registration form loads with Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password fields

admin_login.details: Admin login with admin@glowingstar.net / admin123 works correctly

admin_panel.details: Admin Panel loads with WebSocket connection indicator (System Online), shows dashboard stats, top contestants, recent votes

contestants_page.details: Displays contestant cards with search and filter functionality

leaderboard_page.details: Shows Live Rankings indicator, real-time update support, podium display for top 3

api_health_check.details: Returns 'glowing-star-contest-api' service name with websocket, fraud-detection, email-templates features

mocked_apis.email_otp: MOCKED - send_otp_email function logs to console instead of sending actual emails
